issue_title: Mockito.after() method accepts negative timeperiods and subsequent verifications always pass
issue_description:
e.g.

```
Runnable runnable = Mockito.mock(Runnable.class);
Mockito.verify(runnable, Mockito.never()).run(); // passes as expected
Mockito.verify(runnable, Mockito.after(1000).never()).run(); // passes as expected
Mockito.verify(runnable, Mockito.after(-1000).atLeastOnce()).run(); // passes incorrectly
```

org.mockito.internal.util.TimerTest::sho.error_msg:
junit.framework.AssertionFailedError: It is forbidden to create timer with negative value of timer's duration.
